events.name: China PBoC Loan Prime Rate (1-Year)
events.description: The PBoC's benchmark lending rate setting borrowing costs across China's corporate and household credit markets.

events.name: Canada CPI (Y-o-Y) (May)
events.description: Measures the annual rate of consumer price change in Canada, guiding Bank of Canada monetary policy decisions.

events.name: US Manufacturing PMI Flash (Jun)
events.description: Preliminary S&P Global survey of US factory activity, providing an early read on industrial output and order trends.

events.name: UK Services PMI Flash (Jun)
events.description: Preliminary reading of UK services sector activity, reflecting conditions in the dominant part of the British economy.

events.name: Germany IFO Business Climate (Jun)
events.description: Monthly survey of German firms measuring current conditions and six-month expectations for Europe's largest economy.

events.name: Australia Monthly CPI (May)
events.description: Monthly consumer price inflation gauge covering Australia's capital cities, directly shaping RBA interest rate deliberations.

events.name: US GDP (Q1 2026, Third Estimate)
events.description: The BEA's final estimate of annualised US output growth in Q1 2026, informing the broader economic expansion outlook.

events.name: US Initial Jobless Claims
events.description: Weekly count of new unemployment benefit applications, providing a real-time gauge of US labour market conditions.

events.name: US Core PCE Price Index (Y-o-Y) (May)
events.description: The Federal Reserve's preferred inflation measure, tracking consumer spending price changes excluding food and energy.

events.name: Japan Tokyo CPI (Y-o-Y) (Jun)
events.description: Tokyo's advance June inflation reading, a leading indicator of national CPI trends closely tracked by the BoJ.
